title: Panchari Bazar Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Panchari Bazar with a Z-Score of +3.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Panchari Bazar has reached a critical level, with a Z-Score of +3.14 indicating a significant anomaly from the average temperature. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.0 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating the extreme heat. 
 The high temperature is also accompanied by high humidity at 80% and moderate winds at 15.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Panchari Bazar.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
